column2: Open CEDA users agree to prominently include the attribution CEDA by Watershed (a) wherever Scope 3 emissions calculations are generated, including Emissions Reports and excerpts; (b) on users marketing sites where emission factors are mentioned; and (c) on any part of userss platform, such as websites, web portals, or other applications where Scope 3 calculations are generated.

Questions: for inquiries about CEDA commercials or requests for additional data features such as data pre-adjusted to use for other years, currencies or in purchaser price, breakdown by scopes 1,2 and 3 or by FLAG and non FLAG emissions please reach out to ceda@watershed.com for more information.
